caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap and a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering sits in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. The background is white, featuring a logo with five gold stars and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE" repeated vertically. To the right, a blue banner reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". A black mug with red and white text that says "TALK OUT" sits on the desk. The man's facial expression shifts slightly across the sequence; he begins with a neutral look, then closes his eyes and winces, before returning to a more open expression with his mouth slightly parted as if speaking. A small circular logo is visible on the lower left of the frame, and another circular patch is attached to the chest of his hoodie.
